response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep open-source and Linux experience, but he does not meet two core requirements for this executive role: German proficiency is listed as basic while C1 is mandatory for a client-facing leadership position in German IT consulting, and his career history shows almost exclusively hands-on developer roles with no formal team-leadership, architecture-ownership, or project-management track record. His founder experience and teaching activity partially offset this, but not enough for a Head of Development position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Genuine open-source commitment (founder of GISCollective, multiple D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker)
Mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, courses, and coding dojos
concerns: German is basic; the role requires minimum C1 for client advisory work
No demonstrated formal leadership of teams or operational oversight of client projects
No evidence of Python, UML, or requirements-management experience listed as desired/required

key_factors.factor: German language gap (basic vs. required C1)
Lack of formal leadership/technical project management experience
Strong open-source and Linux engineering background
